entries.openingLines: It was a bright cold day in April, and the clocks were striking thirteen.
entries.title: Nineteen Eighty-Four
entries.author: George Orwell

entries.openingLines: The sky above the port was the color of television, tuned to a dead channel.
entries.title: Neuromancer
entries.author: William Gibson

entries.openingLines: In a hole in the ground there lived a hobbit.
entries.title: The Hobbit
entries.author: J.R.R. Tolkien
